utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. Each of these must be fully specified with details and costs as relevant. Reviewing the final property solution: (1) property — fully detailed with address, price, features, taxes, utilities, etc. (2) financing — fully detailed with amounts, terms, rates, and additional costs. (3) legal_services — includes firm, services, and estimated cost. (4) moving_services — includes provider, services, and estimated cost. (5) setup_services — includes utilities, organizing service, and costs. (6) total_budget — includes all cost breakdowns and totals. All six items are present and fully specified with details and costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final solution centers on a purchase property at 1423 Pilgrims Way, Glen Abbey, Oakville, priced at CAD 899,000. This aligns with the 'purchase_properties' section of the ground truth rather than rentals. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the closest match by property type and price (within the CAD 850K–950K range and being a detached family home) is the 'Family House' rated 10. The financing in the solution is a standard fixed-rate mortgage using existing home equity, matching 'Traditional Mortgage' in the 'purchase_financing' section (rating 9). Legal services are provided by a law group for CAD 2,100 covering title, purchase review, and closing—corresponding most closely to the 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 9). The moving service is a full-service local package at CAD 2,800, which corresponds to 'Corporate Relocation' (rating 2) because of its pricing and scope. The setup services include multiple utilities with an ongoing total of CAD 450 per month, which best matches 'Business Setup' from 'utility_setup' (rating 5) given the higher ongoing cost structure and business-like scope.
